message:
fix(bulkhead): return QueueTimeout instead of UnknownRequest for expired queued entries

poll_queued previously evicted all expired entries before looking up the
requested ID, causing expired requests to return UnknownRequest instead of
QueueTimeout. Reorder operations: find request first, check expiry, call
reject_expired_queued_request helper, then sweep remaining expired entries.
After sweep, relocate target request via fresh position search to prevent
incorrect promotion logic.

Add test for QueueTimeout correctness and live-request survivability when
an earlier queued entry times out.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
